text:
進撃st-hrn-gt-pf20130629巨人 is the 4th track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack II. It is also the 12th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

st – String instruments
hrn – horns
gt – guitar
pf – Piano/Pianoforte (Italian)

Musical motifs

The track is split into 2 parts. The first part (0:00-2:15) is a remix of 巨♀~9地区, but includes a horn rendition of Bauklötze's chorus at 1:25-1:42. The second part (2:15-4:36) has a pounding drum beat.
